other_conversations.title: Help with order #2961498912
other_conversations.excerpt:
Dear sandicruz02,

I would like to take a moment to address your concern and provide some context about the current situation.Since starting my shop on Etsy in 2019, I've had the pleasure of creating over 5000 dresses, earning 1000 5-star reviews from satisfied customers. Unfortunately, Etsy has suddenly suspended my store, a decision that has caught me off guard and one with which I do not agree.

We understand that this situation may cause inconvenience and difficulties for you. However, we also completely did not anticipate encountering this scenario. To address this issue, we would like to ask for your assistance by reaching out to Etsy's support department and requesting them to reopen our store.

I really want to issue your reship a new dress to you but I can not use my store funds.
Once our store is reopened by Etsy, we commit to prioritizing the swift and efficient processing of your refund request.

We deeply appreciate your ongoing support, and we sincerely hope for your understanding in this matter. We will make every effort to resolve the issue and ensure that you receive the best possible support.

etsy.excerpt: Hope everything goes well, thank you for responding.
